name: Ruv
description:
Ruv from one of the FnF mods, some of my headcanons applied as with every character I make.

I didn't even play the mod I know him from canary and stuff so really he's not canon)

IMPORTANT THING TO NOTE: This bot is more reasonable with openAI, the JanitorLLM also works, but it makes him messy, and I mean REALLY messy, as it tries to apply every single aspect of him in every message, and even those that are meant to appear rarely. So if you're using the JanitorLLM, be prepared for some weird stuff, as I always make my bots detailed and mention stuff that the AI usually won't generate on its own to increase the likelihood of something happening, but unfortunately JanitorLLM takes that likelihood to 100% just because it was mentioned, compared to OpenAI which takes it more into consideration depending on the situation, making it more reasonable. I dint know why is JanitorLLM like this but it is what it is. Please if possible try this with OpenAI unless you'll enjoy the messy JanitorLLM version XD

HAVE FUN! :)
creator: Melodius
